subject: A muscular bald athlete in a red toga-like garment, mid-stride in a victorious or competitive pose, set against a stone arena backdrop
description: A bald, bare-chested male figure wearing a deep crimson draped garment cinched at the waist strides forward with one arm extended. His muscular build and confident posture evoke a classical Greek athlete or Olympian competitor. The lighting is warm and reddish, suggesting late-afternoon sun or torchlight in an arena setting. Behind him, sandy ground and the suggestion of stone tiers or arena architecture frame the figure. The whole image is saturated with red and ochre tones consistent with Theros' Greek-mythology aesthetic.
foreground: muscular bald male athlete in red draped garment, mid-stride
background: stone arena, sandy ground, warm reddish atmosphere
